design_notes: The packs are non-destructive upgrades for earlier asset packs.
Each pack includes a random skin system using seeded weighted selection and nearby duplicate rejection.
Dynamic camera profiles are configured to trigger at combat start, boss phase start, aerial combo, and special attack moments.
Combat-flow smoothing is implemented through input buffers, cancel windows, combo-preservation flags, and camera-safe combo logic.
